Egan Storage Conditions for 1/23/2026


Notice Text:

The following restriction will be in place on the Egan Hub Storage (Egan) for Gas Day, January 23, 2026:

Egan has restricted a portion of excess withdrawal nominations. No increases in withdrawals will be accepted except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Egan has scheduled and sealed injection nominations and IWS activities at meter ANR - STORAGE, LA (D40102/R40101). No increases in injection nominations or IWS activity will be accepted at meter ANR - STORAGE, LA (D40102/R40101).

Egan has scheduled and sealed injection nomination from meter FGT-STORAGE, LA (D40114/R40113). No increases in injections will be accepted except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.



BackPrint
